# AWS Architecture Plan — Vino

**Generated:** auto-generated by GSD Framework
**Region:** us-east-1
**Environments:** DEV, PROD
**Modules:** django, postgresql, redis, celery, social_auth, jwt, rest_api, file_encryption, docker, cicd, monitoring, testing, linting

---

## Per-Environment Stacks

### DEV

| Service | Spec |
|---------|------|
| ECS Cluster | `vino-dev` |
| Fargate | 0.25 vCPU, 512 MB, 1 task |
| RDS PostgreSQL 16 | db.t4g.micro |
| ElastiCache Redis | cache.t4g.micro |
| ALB | dev.example.com |

### PROD

| Service | Spec |
|---------|------|
| ECS Cluster | `vino-prod` |
| Fargate | 1 vCPU, 2 GB, 2 tasks |
| RDS PostgreSQL 16 | db.t4g.medium, Multi-AZ |
| ElastiCache Redis | cache.t4g.medium |
| ALB | example.com |

## Shared Infrastructure

| Service | Details |
|---------|---------|
| ECR | `vino` container repo with lifecycle policies |
| AWS SSO | Identity Center, no long-lived keys |
| Secrets Manager | Per-env secret rotation |
| Route 53 | `example.com` with env-specific subdomains |
| ACM | SSL/TLS certificates (auto-renew) |
| ALB | Application Load Balancer per environment |
| S3 | `vino-assets` for static & media |
| CloudWatch | Logs, metrics, alarms per environment |

## Monitoring Infrastructure

- **Sentry** — error tracking and performance monitoring
- **Structured logging** — JSON logs to CloudWatch
- **Health checks** — automated ALB health monitoring
